caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT MAN", and a gold chain, is seated in a studio for a podcast recording. He is wearing over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background is a light-colored wall featuring logos that read "HUSTLE" and "BOSS TALK 101", along with a graphic that says "PODCAST". On-screen overlays include a logo for "PODCAST" and the text "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man adjusts his headphones with both hands, then moves his right hand away from his head while keeping his left hand nearby. He then rests his chin on his left hand, glancing slightly to the side, before closing his eyes and remaining in a thoughtful pose. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist throughout the clip.
